title: Crosslinking Immunoprecipitation Beads
author: Bryon Drown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdhki34w

steps.title: Form complex with beads and antibody
steps.instruction: Form complex with beads and antibody

steps.title: Add 900 uL Binding Buffer and...
steps.instruction: Add 900 uL Binding Buffer and 100 uL magnetic beads to 1.5 mL LoBind tube.

steps.title: Collect beads with magnet and resuspend...
steps.instruction: Collect beads with magnet and resuspend with 900 uL Binding Buffer. DynaMag-2 (Magnet, Invitrogen, 12321D, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/12321D#/12321D )

steps.title: Incubate overnight with rotation
steps.instruction: Incubate overnight with rotation. Tube Rovolver (Fisher, 88861051, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/88881001#/88881001 ) 4 °C Overnight

steps.title: Prepare fresh triethanolamine and ethanolamine buffers
steps.instruction: Prepare fresh triethanolamine and ethanolamine buffers. DMP should be added to Crosslinking Buffer immediately before use.

steps.title: Collect beads with magnet and remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Collect beads with magnet and remove supernatant. Wash beads with 1 mL TEA Wash Buffer.

steps.title: Resuspend beads with 1 mL Crosslinking...
steps.instruction: Resuspend beads with 1 mL Crosslinking Buffer and incubate at ambient temperature for 1 hr while rotating. 01:00:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Collect beads with magnet and immediately...
steps.instruction: Collect beads with magnet and immediately wash beads with 1 mL Quenching Buffer. Resuspend beads in 1 mL Quenching Buffer and incubate at ambient temperature for 15 min while rotating. 00:15:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Collect beads with magnet and wash...
steps.instruction: Collect beads with magnet and wash beads with 1 mL TEA Wash Buffer, 1 mL Basic Elution Buffer, 1 mL Acidic Elution Buffer, and 1 mL TBS twice.

steps.title: Store beads in 1 mL Storage Buffer at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Store beads in 1 mL Storage Buffer at 4 °C
